user.title: SwitchBot API credentials
user.description: Get your token and secret from the SwitchBot app. Open the app, go to Profile, then Preferences (or Preferences -> About on app 9.0+). Tap the App Version number 10 times to reveal Developer Options. Tap Developer Options, then Get Token to view your token and secret key. Copy both values and enter them below.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the SwitchBot API

abort.already_configured: This SwitchBot authentication helper is already configured.

init.title: SwitchBot devices

get_devices.name: Get devices
get_devices.description: Fetch the SwitchBot device list and return names, IDs, and types.

send_command.name: Send command
send_command.description: Send a SwitchBot command to a specific device.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The SwitchBot device ID to target.

command.name: Command
command.description: The command to send, for example `turnOn` or `turnOff`.

parameter.name: Parameter
parameter.description: The command parameter. Most commands use `default`.

command_type.name: Command type
command_type.description: The command type. Most commands use `command`.
